title: Nonlinear stability of the one dimensional screened Vlasov Poisson equation
summary: We study the asymptotic behavior of small data solutions to the screened Vlasov Poisson(i.e. Vlasov-Yukawa) equation on ${\mathbb R}\times{\mathbb R}$ near vacuum. We show that for initial data small in Gevrey-2 regularity, the derivative of the density of order $n$ decays like $(t+1)^{-n-1}$.
